description_long: This advertising board features a rectangular, freestanding structure with a prominent front display panel. The front face is covered with a yellow background and bold black text promoting Sika US's digital business opportunities. The sides and back of the board are a uniform dark gray, with no visible graphics or text. The board has a slightly tapered shape, wider at the top and narrowing toward the base, giving it a modern, stable appearance. The surface appears smooth and hard, likely constructed from metal or composite materials, with a matte or semi-gloss finish. There are no visible illumination features or interactive components, and the board is designed to be placed in high-traffic urban environments for maximum visibility.
description: A freestanding, rectangular advertising board with a yellow front display featuring bold black text, and smooth, dark gray sides and back.
description_view_0: Front view showing the yellow display panel with black promotional text and a slight horizontal seam.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the board's dark gray, smooth, and slightly tapered profile with no visible text or graphics.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying a plain, dark gray surface with a subtle gradient and no content.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, identical to the other side, showing the board's dark gray, smooth, and tapered edge.
attribute_frame_design: thick, solid frame with slightly tapered sides and a smooth, matte finish
attribute_advertisement_content: static printed advertisement with black text on a yellow background promoting Sika US's digital business opportunities
